---
title: "04. 人间处世与最小干预"
subtitle: "Human Affairs and Minimal Intervention"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 4
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "The recurring problem is how to pass through a high-risk interface while adding as little distortion and friction as possible. That makes Fold and rate-distortion the natural formal directions: correc..."
---

**Chapters:** 4, 11, 24  
**Omega Directions:** `fold-operator`, `rate-distortion-information-theory`, `fiber-structure`

{{< include articles/category_04_human_affairs_minimal_intervention.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_04_human_affairs_minimal_intervention Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_04_human_affairs_minimal_intervention_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_04_human_affairs_minimal_intervention_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_04_human_affairs_minimal_intervention_infographic.png)
